metadata.description: Creative Core Cloud plugins for Claude — AI agent tooling and connectors.

plugins.name: oriel
plugins.description: Oriel — agent control surface for the shared Agent Board v2 (Workspace > Project > Epic > Story > Task). Remote MCP (Agent Board) at the stable URL mcp.ori3l.com/abm (gateway-routed to the v2 Koyeb backend; Oriel web login) + the /oriel command (start project · start/stop loop · tick · check board · update-board).
